Build panel directly from source accessors

Source: R/spec-compat.R
build_panel_from_sources.Rd

Build panel directly from source accessors

Usage

build_panel_from_sources(
  antigen = "MCV1",
  disease = "measles",
  years = NULL,
  countries = NULL,
  demography_source = getOption("vpdsus.demography_source", "example"),
  indicator_set = c("explicit", "dynamic", "both"),
  coverage = NULL,
  cases = NULL,
  demography = NULL,
  country_metadata = NULL,
  conflict = NULL,
  include_conflict = FALSE,
  conflict_source = c("ucdp_fixture", "wb_battle_deaths")
)

Arguments

antigen

Coverage antigen passed to get_coverage().

disease

Cases disease passed to get_cases().

years

Optional integer vector.

countries

Optional ISO3 vector.

demography_source

Demography source passed to get_demography().

indicator_set

Indicator registry mode for measles-related indicators. One of \"explicit\", \"dynamic\", \"both\". Stored as panel attribute.

coverage

Optional precomputed coverage tibble (iso3, year, coverage).

cases

Optional precomputed cases tibble (iso3, year, cases).

demography

Optional precomputed demography tibble.

country_metadata

Optional precomputed country metadata tibble.

conflict

Optional precomputed conflict tibble.

include_conflict

Logical; if TRUE, merge conflict indicators.

conflict_source

Conflict source passed to get_conflict() when include_conflict = TRUE and conflict is NULL.

Value

A vpd_panel.
